contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 270
- Description: Prod recovery + vault DAO-Identity UX + context-overflow & GAS-stamp root-cause fixes
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/184
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/186
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/187
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/188
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/189
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/106
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/346
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/473
  
  Details:
  Continuation after the 240-min Sophia incident-response report. Spanned 4 repos.
  
  PRODUCTION RECOVERY: root-caused + fixed a prod-down (a duplicated function body in app/main.py from a vault-auth edit -> IndentationError -> uvicorn crash-loop; fixed on box + truesight_autopilot #184). Recovered multiple session-level thread bricks (780/2622/2744) via backed-up session resets; confirmed the self-restart guards held (no SIGKILL).
  
  VAULT DAO-IDENTITY UX (truesight_autopilot, sophia.truesight.me/vault): verified the capoeira-style RSA-signature login works end-to-end with Gary's governor key; then #186 auto-generate keypair + governor recognition (POST /api/whoami greets a known governor by name); #187 in-page email-to-public-key linking via the @truesight_dao/dao-client npm lib (like oracle: registerEmail/verifyEmail + Edgar check_digital_signature, with verified/pending/unlinked states); #188 auto sign-in recognized governors + clear localStorage keypair on sign-out.
  
  ROOT-CAUSE THREAD CONTEXT OVERFLOW (truesight_autopilot #189): the recurring 780/2622 brick wasnt the self-heal -- the history trim was 400K CHARS (assumed ~4 chars/token) but tool-result/key-dense content runs ~2 chars/token, so 400K chars = ~200K tokens, 1.5x over DeepSeeks 131072-token window; threads overflowed and returned empty BEFORE the char-trim fired (measured 780 at 275083 chars = 135123 tokens = 103 percent). Replaced with token-aware trim (90K-token budget), applied in BOTH chat paths.
  
  DAO_PROTOCOL #106: restored the dao_members cache-refresh durability -- the ported trigger was a one-shot GET (vs the Rails Sidekiq retry), so a transient GAS failure after an email verification left a freshly-verified key stale until the daily cron; added bounded retry (3 attempts, 2s/6s backoff).
  
  TOKENOMICS #346: fixed the QR purchase-notification emailer (processBatch) flooding admin@truesight.me with false stamp-verification-failed alerts + re-sending customers duplicate emails. Diagnosed via the Sheets API (ruled out M1-formula, data-validation, merged-cells; confirmed admin is an editor) -> the verify read-back races the write commit; added 4x write+read retry. Pushed live via clasp (script 1MnAsIQA @HEAD).
  
  Also: vault-login handoff doc (agentic_ai_context #473); traced the perch.truesight.me unblock (Sophia targeting krake_nginx, but the box is seni_ror where her key is already authorized).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 450.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
